PreToolUse.command: docker exec -i -w /workspace ecommerceapp-context-mode context-mode-hook vscode-copilot pretooluse

UserPromptSubmit.command: docker exec -i -w /workspace ecommerceapp-context-mode context-mode-hook vscode-copilot userpromptsubmit

PreCompact.command: docker exec -i -w /workspace ecommerceapp-context-mode context-mode-hook vscode-copilot precompact

SessionStart.command: docker exec -i -w /workspace ecommerceapp-context-mode context-mode-hook vscode-copilot sessionstart
